title: Project Report: CSV-to-Warehouse Batch Pipeline — Data Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Python ETL script: extract CSV, transform with pandas, load to PostgreSQL with logging.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Beginner)*

**CSV-to-Warehouse Batch Pipeline** is a beginner-level end-to-end project for Data Engineer. Duration: 2 weeks. Python ETL script: extract CSV, transform with pandas, load to PostgreSQL with logging. Tools: Python, pandas, PostgreSQL.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Extract from CSV/API
Objective: Transform and validate
Objective: Load to PostgreSQL
Objective: Idempotent daily run
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Data Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Data Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Data Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Extract
chapters.content:

Read CSV with pandas. Complete these tasks: Schema detection; Error rows. Deliverable for this phase: Raw landing table.

Code Reference:

```text
- [ ] Error rows
```

chapters.title: Phase: Load
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Load** *(Level: Beginner)*

Code Reference:
```text

- [ ] Transaction
```

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Beginner)*

Submit all final deliverables: Pipeline script; SQL DDL; Run log sample. Skills demonstrated: ETL, Python, SQL. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Pipeline script
Deliverable: SQL DDL
Deliverable: Run log sample
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Pipeline script and passes the rubric.
